name: Deemed Paid Foreign Tax Credit

eligibility.description: Available to domestic corporations that are U.S. shareholders of a Controlled Foreign Corporation (CFC) with Subpart F or GILTI inclusions.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Domestic corporations are deemed to have paid the foreign taxes actually paid by their CFCs on income included under Subpart F or GILTI, allowing for a credit against U.S. tax liability.
